name: 99freelas-mcp-server
description: Private/local MCP adapter for 99Freelas using stdio transport.

scripts.coverage: npm run build && c8 --all --include=dist/**/*.js --exclude=dist/**/*.d.ts --exclude=dist/index.js --exclude=dist/storage/stateDatabase.js --check-coverage --lines 100 --functions 100 --statements 100 node --test tests/**/*.test.cjs
